plugins.name: code-safely-plugin
plugins.description: Safety guardrails and convenience auto-approvals for Claude Code: blocks destructive commands, protects critical dotfiles and credentials, prevents secret leaks and force-pushes, and auto-approves read-only/test/build commands.

plugins.name: kanban-flow
plugins.description: Autonomous, card-driven kanban development: an orchestrator and specialist agents that run each backlog card through slice → design → implement → test → review, shipping design and implementation as two reviewable PRs per card.

plugins.name: github-app-identity
plugins.description: Give local automation a dedicated GitHub App identity: a directory-aware gh shim, token minter, and git credential helper make commits/pushes/gh act as the App inside opted-in repos, never falling back to personal credentials.

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.description: Skills for working more productively with Claude Code. 'handoff' distils the current session into a single self-contained document; 'continue' reads it back in a fresh session and proposes an approved plan to resume the work — preserving context across sessions.
